title: pvp artoyy
description:
A simple PvP resource pack that improves swords, armor, GUI and hit effects. 
Designed to make PvP cleaner, clearer and give better visibility during fights.
body:
This PvP resource pack is designed to improve your gameplay experience by making everything cleaner and easier to see.

Features:
- Clean and simple textures
- Improved visibility in fights
- Optimized for PvP performance
- Custom swords and tools
- Better GUI and minimalistic design

Why use this pack?
It helps you focus on enemies, reduces visual noise, and gives you an advantage in PvP.

Perfect for:
- BedWars
- SkyWars
- Duels
- Survival PvP
